Description: Evaluates the type of validation message to show when a day’s reported time entries total to more than the specified threshold, and there’s no break reported for the day.

Inputs.description: Payroll time type that identifies a break entry, such as Break, Tea, or Meal.

Inputs.name: CODE_FOR_ALTERNATE_MESSAGE
Inputs.description: Message to display if the worker doesn't record a break and the total reported entries exceeds the break threshold.

Inputs.name: MIN_BREAK_DUR_IN_MINUTES
Inputs.description: Duration a worker needs to take for their break before it counts as a break.

Inputs.name: THRESHOLD_IN_HOURS
Inputs.description: How many hours the worker can work before they should take a break.

Inputs.name: WORKED_TIME_CONDITION
Inputs.description: Time category that identifies the reported time entries to use to evaluate whether there should be a corresponding break.
